title: Dispatcher Board — Phase 2: Drag and Drop
description: Add drag-and-drop using dnd-kit. Jobs draggable from pool to driver columns and back. State updates on drop. Still uses mock data from phase 1.
acceptanceCriteria: DndContext wraps the full board in DispatcherBoard.tsx
JobCard uses useDraggable — dragging is smooth with visual feedback
JobPool and DriverColumn use useDroppable with correct droppable ids
onDragEnd updates assignedDriverId in state: null for pool, driverId for columns
Dragging a job from driver column back to pool sets assignedDriverId to null
No backend calls in this phase — state only
implementationNotes: Pool droppable id must be the string 'pool'
Driver column droppable id must be the driver's id string
onDragEnd: if over.id === 'pool' set assignedDriverId to null, else set to over.id
Add CSS transform via useDraggable transform style for drag preview
Do not rewrite phase 1 components — extend them only
